author: codex

patch.value: Security, dependency, correctness, and governance remediation

Coordinated remediation tranche covering the current GitHub dependency-alert backlog, stale dependency PRs, session-output correctness issue #23, workflow modernization, deeper repository audit findings, and end-to-end release proof.

All current Dependabot alerts are closed by patched dependency resolutions.; Issue #23 has regression tests and correct human/machine-readable output.; Repository checks, package smoke tests, and GitHub checks pass on the pushed head.

message: Start broad remediation epic after all-status duplicate check returned zero local items

value.author: codex
value.text: Remediation tranche delivered by PR #25 at merge daa3eee. All four direct child work items are closed with item-specific evidence; live GitHub security and work queues are empty.

patch.value: Delivered the coordinated remediation tranche and verified all direct children on the merged default branch.
Zero actionable alerts, fixed issue #23, green release validation, and durable repository-local pm tracking.
All direct children closed; GitHub queues and alerts are empty; merged-head validate:release passes.
Security, dependency, correctness, workflow, documentation, and governance remediation shipped in PR #25.
